params.description: Empty horizontal picture graph appears in creating mode. Categories Red, Blue, Yellow visible. Symbol selected and ready to place. Key reads 'Each symbol = 1 item.'
Data table exists but not visible. Contains class data from counting activity.

steps.text: Watch how I show our Red on the graph. You counted 5 Red. So I add 5 symbols. One... two... three... four... five. 5 symbols. Each one means 1 Red.

params.description: System places symbols one at a time in Red row. Each placement accompanied by count narration. Final state shows 5 symbols in Red row.

elements.description: Horizontal picture graph in creating mode. Red row shows 5 symbols placed. Blue and Yellow rows empty. Key reads 'Each symbol = 1 item.'
